source: Eurostat namq_10_gdp, current-price GDP (CP_MEUR, SCA), 4q-trailing member share of EA20
note: Member share of euro-area GDP, used as the pass-through weight for the contagious sovereign-spread channel (ΔYIELD10_EA = w_member · Δspread). Sum = 0.9902; the ~1% residual is HR/CY/MT (not modelled as members). Real values, not fabricated — regenerate via pipeline namq_10_gdp CP_MEUR.
